news.title: Trump says talks between U.S. and Iran to resume in Pakistan on Monday
news.summary: Iran's top negotiator says his government has "no trust" in its enemies. Trump says the U.S. won't be blackmailed.

news.title: SiIicon Valley's AI agent hiccups: Wasted tokens and 'chaotic' systems

news.title: We spoke to over 30 central bankers, policymakers and politicians. Here are their top concerns
news.summary: The U.S.-Iran war is one of the biggest risks facing the world, experts say. From stagflation to energy security, policymakers talk about the risks.

news.title: Berkshire shares left behind as S&P 500 rallies to record high
news.summary: Berkshire's shares slipped to MTD drops of just under 1%. While the overall market was soaring over the past two weeks, Berkshire wasn't doing much of anything.

news.title: Top Wall Street analysts are bullish on these 3 stocks for the long haul
news.summary: Picking stocks can be challenging due to the vast universe of equities. Investors can follow the ratings of top Street analysts and make informed decisions.

news.title: I’m planning to retire at 60. Should I sell my house and invest the $500,000?
news.summary: “Renting improves cash flow by about $1,300 a month’s worth of rent,” says the owner. “Renters get better value for their money.”

news.title: ‘I have full guardianship’: My son has special needs. If I buy him a condo, will that hurt his benefits?
news.summary: “Another option would be for me to purchase the condo myself and have him pay me rent,” she said. “I’d like to be able to live in my own home.”

news.title: ‘I have more money than I know what to do with’: I’m a single millionaire with no heirs and don’t like spending. What’s wrong with me?
news.summary: "I buy clothes at thrift stores," she says. "I don't buy clothes from stores. I buy them from thrift shops"

news.title: ‘It is their fault’: My condo board forgot to bill for storage fees. Must I pay retroactively?
news.summary: “They now intend to bill us for seven to eight months of storage fees,” he says. “They’re going to charge us for storage fees.”

news.title: New York City is floating a $500 million second-home tax — and it would hurt industries that support thousands of jobs
news.summary: Surcharge on luxury units is a gamble that the ultrawealthy won’t leave for low-tax states. Surcharge will be charged on all luxury units sold in the United States.
